workflow_goal: Generate a standalone two-node thermal chain Modelica model.
requirements: Use only built-in Real declarations; do not import or reference external Modelica libraries.
Build a two-node thermal chain with both nodes initially at 293.15 K.
A 333.15 K heat source drives node A through conductance 0.6, and node A exchanges heat with node B through conductance 0.25.
Use heat capacities 120 for node A and 180 for node B.
Represent both thermal nodes as dynamic states and expose simulation result variables named nodeATemperature, nodeBTemperature, and temperatureDifference.
The model should be executable as a settling transient in OpenModelica.
acceptance: The final model must be complete Modelica source code.
The final model must declare the exact top-level model name WorkflowV02_MediumGenThermalChain.
OpenModelica simulate(model_name) must reach an accepted simulation status with the specified stop_time, intervals, and warning policy.
The requested observable variables nodeATemperature, nodeBTemperature, and temperatureDifference must appear in the generated model.
